optionA.text: Setae present at the base of the tentacular cirri

optionB.text: Setae absent at the base of the tentacular cirri

optionA.text: Two pairs of tentacular cirri on one segment; parapodial cirri long and digitate

optionB.text: Three pairs of tentacular cirri on two segments; parapodial cirri short

optionA.text: First two or three parapodia modified and with large, simple setae

optionB.text: All parapodia similar, all setae composite spinigers
